title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Completed and committed the Layer 1 no-op/reconcile run-summary completeness slice as 5408126 feat: enrich no-op reconcile summaries. Duplicate/no-op summaries now include current source state, known original path, backward-compatible existing_artifacts, richer existing_artifact_details, archive/reconcile state, and repair.changed/ledger_event. reconcile --json repaired/skipped entries now include source_sha256 and meeting_id where known. Claude review returned commit-ready-with-notes; the actionable note was fixed by reporting known meeting_id for non-primary skipped records and adding regression coverage. Verification: uv run pytest tests/test_pipeline_ingest.py => 53 passed; uv run pytest => 119 passed; py_compile passed; git diff --check passed.
next_actions: Start a fresh session from a clean pushed main branch. Continue Roadmap Layer 1 or move toward Layer 3 session inbox automation. Recommended next slice: inspect remaining agent-facing summaries and docs for session inbox automation readiness, especially batch/session wrapper state planning and whether ingest-inbox should gain a provider=session engine-assisted workflow.
